💰 Dynamic Chip N00084 Black Check with Blue M12638 Light Blue M12639 Green M12640 Burgundy M12641 Pink M12642 Dark Blue M12643 Yellow M12863 Green Embossed M13009 Yellow Embossed M13023 Red Embossed M11497 Dark Blue Embossed M59478 Black Embossed M44494 Monogram N40127 Black Check M46354 Black Flower M11482 Silver Flower M12651 Green Print
This Dopp Kit wash bag is crafted from fine-grain Taurillon Monogram leather, allowing you to carry toiletries and other personal items elegantly. The bag features a spacious capacity, double zipper closure, and a washable lining, combining style and practicality. This accessory makes a thoughtful gift and perfectly complements any travel bag. Detailed Dimensions: 28 x 15 x 16.5 cm
